subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the verses in truth and ordained for every soul what He willeth. He, verily, is the All-Powerful, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی نزل الایات بالحق و قدر لکل نفس ما اراد انه لهو المقتدر العلیم الحکیم نسقی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
